description: Congressional Votes on American Health Care Act (in 2017)
proposed_title: AHCA Vote by Party and Trump-District Status (2017 US House)
encoding_note: AHCAvote=1 is a "yes" vote (Success); Party (D vs R) is treatment; Trump=1 (district won by Trump in 2016) is the primary stratum. Aggregate to count yes votes (Successes) and total members (Cases) per Party × Trump cell.
